calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Christopher Hite; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:21 p.m.; and concluded at 2:26 p.m.

Mark Kuntze, Esq, specially appearing by Zoom Video Conference for Plaintiff Galaxy International Purchasing, LLC.
Defendant Zijing Liu not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed on September 28, 2022.
Proof of personal service filed on August 11, 2022.
Default entered as to Defendant filed on December 14, 2022.
Dismissal filed as to Defendant Does 1 through 10 on December 14, 2022.
Notice of Default Prove-up Hearing filed on June 9, 2023.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Plaintiff's Written Declaration

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Galaxy International Purchasing, LLC. against Defendant Zijing Liu are as follows:

Damages: $32,792.09
Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $539.40
Total Judgment: $33,331.49

Proposed Judgment signed and filed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Continued To Jul-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
